tool.name: frida_list_processes
tool.description: List processes running on the Frida-attached device.

tool.name: frida_run_script
tool.description:
Inject JavaScript Frida script into a running process; capture console output for wait_seconds.
Script uses Frida JS API for runtime tracing, function hooking, SSL pinning bypass, root detection bypass, etc. mode=attach attaches to running; mode=spawn launches fresh.

tool.name: frida_ssl_bypass
tool.description:
Inject SSL pinning bypass into an Android/iOS app for MITM testing.
Android covers: OkHttp3, TrustManager, WebView, HostnameVerifier, Conscrypt, Cronet. iOS covers: SecTrustEvaluateWithError, NSURLSession, URLSession, TrustKit, Alamofire.
App launches via spawn and bypass hooks attach automatically.

parameter.name: target_package
parameter.description: Android package id (com.example.app) or iOS bundle id.
